stemHtml: An airplane is taxiing and the ATC controller tells the pilot to stop the aircraft and hold position due to an emergency of another plane. The holdover time then expires by 2 minutes by the time the emergency is resolved. What is the correct action?

options.a: Hold position and apply anti-ice system of the aircraft.
options.b: Take off, disregard the expired holdover time.
options.d: Request to taxi back, de-ice and anti-ice the aircraft again.
